name: Prowlarr Easy
icon: data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 96 96'%3E%3Cdefs%3E%3ClinearGradient id='g' x1='0' y1='0' x2='1' y2='1'%3E%3Cstop stop-color='%23081f5c'/%3E%3Cstop offset='1' stop-color='%2300a896'/%3E%3C/linearGradient%3E%3C/defs%3E%3Crect width='96' height='96' rx='22' fill='url(%23g)'/%3E%3Cpath d='M24 26h25c13 0 23 8 23 20s-10 20-23 20H38v12H24zm14 12v16h11c6 0 10-3 10-8s-4-8-10-8z' fill='%23fff'/%3E%3C/svg%3E

endpoint.description: Your Prowlarr base URL or Torznab endpoint. Recommended: use the base URL. Fastest advanced option: a direct /<indexer-id>/api endpoint.

categories.description: Comma-separated category IDs. Default 5070 is the common anime category. Leave empty to search all categories.

maxResults.description: Maximum number of results returned per search. Lower values are faster. Default 10 is recommended.

strictEpisodeMatching.description: Reject single-episode results that do not look like the requested episode number, including obvious batch, range, or season-pack releases.

proxyBaseUrl.description: Optional local proxy helper for HTTP, mixed-content, or local-network issues. Leave empty unless direct requests fail. Example: http://127.0.0.1:8765
